/CAL: CLARIFICATION OF PROBATION TERMS BEFORE JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN/NP//CTORD: THE 01-26-21 SENTENCE ORDERING THE DEFENDANT TO SERVE 42 MONTHS PROBATION MODIFIED/PROB MOD/CO: PROBATION SHALL BE SERVED AS UNSUPERVISED PROBATION FOR A PERIOD 1 YEAR/PROB EXT: 01-26-22/CO: ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED/

/CAL  SENTENCING BEFORE JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 4M:PJ 10D/CTS: 10/4019HALF/PF145 18/DDP2/LCHEM/LVAL/IID:1/COMUN: 200/CO:COURT AND COUNSEL AGREE THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY COMPLETED 100 OF THE200 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE ORDERED, 100 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE REMAINS/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/CITE/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD: THE $10 CITE FEE INSTEAD OF THE $25 OR FEE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD/X: A PLEA FORMWAS NOT SUBMITTED TO THE COURT,/X: 23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/CO: DEFENSE'S ORAL DUENAS MOTION IS GRANTED/CTORD: FINES AND FEES SUSPENDED/
